```{r}
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(FSA)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Color palette used across the paper
# ----------------------------------------------------------
color_maping <- c(
  "Acinar" = "gold1",
  "B_cells" = "maroon",
  "Lymphocyte(CD4)" = "green4",
  "Lymphocytes" = "green4",
  "Myeloid(Macrophages)" = "#6A3D9A",
  "Endothelial" = "#FF7F00",
  "Endocrine" = "yellow4",
  "Stellate" = "khaki2",
  "Other immune" = "skyblue2",
  "Adipocytes" = "steelblue4",
  "Lymphocyte(NK)" = "green2",
  "Lymphocyte(CD8)" = "palegreen2",
  "Lymphocytes(CD4-CD8-)" ="darkolivegreen",
  "Myeloid(DCs)" ="orchid1",
  "Myeloid" = "#CAB2D6",
  "Schwann" = "#FDBF6F",
  "Myeloid(C1q_macrophages)" = "#CAB2D6",
  "Nerve" = "#FDBF6F",
  "B_cells_(Plasma_cells)"  = "brown1", 
  "Non_immune" ="grey"
)

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Immune label harmonization (your corrected mapping)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
immune_recode <- c(
  "CD4 T cells" = "Lymphocyte(CD4)",
  "CD8 T cells" = "Lymphocyte(CD8)",
  "CD8- CD4- T cells" = "Lymphocytes(CD4-CD8-)",
  "NK cells" = "Lymphocyte(NK)",
  "CD20+ cells" = "B_cells",
  "CD11c DCs" = "Myeloid(DCs)",
  "CD68+ macro" = "Myeloid(Macrophages)",
  "Other immune cells" = "Other immune",
  "non immune cells" = "Non_immune"
)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: palette that NEVER has missing colors
# ----------------------------------------------------------
make_safe_palette <- function(levels_vec, base_palette) {
  levels_vec <- unique(as.character(levels_vec))
  missing <- setdiff(levels_vec, names(base_palette))

  # Deterministic fallback colors for missing labels (base R)
  fallback <- setNames(
    grDevices::hcl.colors(max(3, length(missing)), palette = "Dark 3"),
    missing
  )

  pal <- c(base_palette, fallback)
  pal <- pal[levels_vec]
  pal
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Read + normalize strings
# ----------------------------------------------------------
combined <- read.csv("combined_selected_columns_corrected_manually.csv",
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

combined <- combined %>%
  mutate(
    ROI_ID = ifelse(is.na(ROI_ID) | ROI_ID == "", "ROI22", ROI_ID),
    ROI_ID = str_trim(ROI_ID),

    RB_CD45   = str_squish(str_trim(RB_CD45)),
    RB_Immune = str_squish(str_trim(RB_Immune)),
    RB_PDL1   = str_squish(str_trim(RB_PDL1))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    RB_Immune = dplyr::recode(RB_Immune, !!!immune_recode, .default = RB_Immune)
  )

# Quick NA check
combined %>% summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.))))

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Helper: percent summary -> wide table
# ----------------------------------------------------------
make_percent_wide <- function(df, roi_col, group_col, prefix) {

  long <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[group_col]]), .data[[group_col]] != "") %>%
    group_by(.data[[roi_col]], .data[[group_col]]) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(.data[[roi_col]]) %>%
    mutate(
      total_cells = sum(n),
      percent = 100 * n / total_cells
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  wide <- long %>%
    transmute(
      ROI_ID = .data[[roi_col]],
      group  = .data[[group_col]],
      percent
    ) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from  = group,
      values_from = percent,
      names_glue  = paste0(prefix, "{group}"),
      values_fill = 0
    )

  list(long = long, wide = wide)
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 3) CD45 / Immune / PDL1
# ----------------------------------------------------------
cd45_obj   <- make_percent_wide(combined, "ROI_ID", "RB_CD45",   "CD45_")
immune_obj <- make_percent_wide(combined, "ROI_ID", "RB_Immune", "immune_")
pdl1_obj   <- make_percent_wide(combined, "ROI_ID", "RB_PDL1",   "PDL1_")

cd45_wide   <- cd45_obj$wide
immune_wide <- immune_obj$wide
pdl1_wide   <- pdl1_obj$wide

stopifnot(!any(duplicated(names(immune_wide))))
stopifnot(!any(duplicated(names(cd45_wide))))
stopifnot(!any(duplicated(names(pdl1_wide))))

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Cytokines (avoid divide-by-zero)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
cytokine_summary <- combined %>%
  filter(RB_CD45 == "CD45+") %>%
  group_by(ROI_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    total_CD45 = n(),

    IFNG_pos  = sum(Nuc_IFNG_dots  >= 5, na.rm = TRUE),
    CXCL9_pos = sum(Nuc_CXCL9_dots >= 5, na.rm = TRUE),
    IL1B_pos  = sum(Nuc_IL1B_dots  >= 5, na.rm = TRUE),

    IFNG_percent  = if_else(total_CD45 > 0, 100 * IFNG_pos  / total_CD45, NA_real_),
    CXCL9_percent = if_else(total_CD45 > 0, 100 * CXCL9_pos / total_CD45, NA_real_),
    IL1B_percent  = if_else(total_CD45 > 0, 100 * IL1B_pos  / total_CD45, NA_real_),

    .groups = "drop"
  )

cytokine_wide <- cytokine_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(ROI_ID, IFNG_percent, CXCL9_percent, IL1B_percent)

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 5) ROI totals + CD45 counts
# ----------------------------------------------------------
roi_total <- combined %>%
  group_by(ROI_ID) %>%
  summarise(total_cells = n(), .groups = "drop")

cd45_counts <- combined %>%
  filter(RB_CD45 == "CD45+") %>%
  group_by(ROI_ID) %>%
  summarise(total_CD45 = n(), .groups = "drop")

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 6) Distance table (trim ROI)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
distance <- read.csv("ROIs_immune_cells.csv",
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

roi_distance <- distance %>%
  dplyr::rename(ROI_ID = ROI) %>%
  mutate(ROI_ID = str_trim(ROI_ID))

# Diagnose which ROIs fail to join
anti_join(roi_total, roi_distance, by = "ROI_ID")

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 7) Final join (start from roi_total to keep ALL ROIs)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
roi_summary <- roi_total %>%
  dplyr::left_join(cd45_counts,   by = "ROI_ID") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(cd45_wide,     by = "ROI_ID") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(immune_wide,   by = "ROI_ID") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(pdl1_wide,     by = "ROI_ID") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(cytokine_wide, by = "ROI_ID") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(roi_distance,  by = "ROI_ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_CD45 = tidyr::replace_na(total_CD45, 0),
    distance_um = as.numeric(.data[["Distance_nerve_um"]]),
    distance_bin = dplyr::case_when(
      distance_um <= 200 ~ "≤200 µm",
      distance_um > 200 & distance_um < 700 ~ "200–699 µm",
      distance_um >= 700 ~ "≥700 µm",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    distance_bin = factor(distance_bin, levels = c("≤200 µm", "200–699 µm", "≥700 µm"))
  )
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 0) ROI order: ROI1..ROI39
# ----------------------------------------------------------
roi_order <- roi_summary %>%
  distinct(ROI_ID) %>%
  mutate(roi_num = as.integer(str_remove(ROI_ID, "^ROI"))) %>%
  arrange(roi_num) %>%
  pull(ROI_ID)

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 1) IMMUNE composition plots (with safe colors)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
immune_levels <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(RB_Immune), RB_Immune != "") %>%
  distinct(RB_Immune) %>%
  pull(RB_Immune) %>%
  sort()

immune_cols <- paste0("immune_", immune_levels)
immune_cols <- immune_cols[immune_cols %in% names(roi_summary)]

immune_long <- roi_summary %>%
  mutate(ROI_ID = factor(ROI_ID, levels = roi_order)) %>%
  dplyr::select(ROI_ID, all_of(immune_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-ROI_ID, names_to = "RB_Immune", values_to = "percent") %>%
  mutate(
    RB_Immune = str_remove(RB_Immune, "^immune_"),
    RB_Immune = factor(RB_Immune, levels = immune_levels)
  )

immune_palette <- make_safe_palette(levels(immune_long$RB_Immune), color_maping)

p_immune_per_roi <- ggplot(immune_long, aes(x = ROI_ID, y = percent, fill = RB_Immune)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = immune_palette, drop = FALSE) +
  ylab("Percent of cells") + xlab("ROI") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank())

p_immune_per_roi

immune_mean <- immune_long %>%
  group_by(RB_Immune) %>%
  summarise(mean_percent = mean(percent, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_immune_mean <- ggplot(immune_mean, aes(x = "Average_ROI", y = mean_percent, fill = RB_Immune)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = immune_palette, drop = FALSE) +
  ylab("Mean percent across ROIs") + xlab("") +
  theme_minimal()

p_immune_mean

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Marker plots (NOT stacked)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
marker_cols <- c("IFNG_percent", "CXCL9_percent", "IL1B_percent", "PDL1_CD45+PDL1+")
marker_cols <- marker_cols[marker_cols %in% names(roi_summary)]

marker_long <- roi_summary %>%
  mutate(ROI_ID = factor(ROI_ID, levels = roi_order)) %>%
  dplyr::select(ROI_ID, all_of(marker_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -ROI_ID, names_to = "marker", values_to = "percent")

p_markers_per_roi <- ggplot(marker_long, aes(x = ROI_ID, y = percent)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ marker, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  ylab("% (per ROI)") + xlab("ROI") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank())

p_markers_per_roi

marker_mean <- marker_long %>%
  group_by(marker) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_percent = mean(percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_percent   = sd(percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_markers_mean <- ggplot(marker_mean, aes(x = marker, y = mean_percent)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_percent - sd_percent,
                    ymax = mean_percent + sd_percent),
                width = 0.2) +
  ylab("Mean % across ROIs (± SD)") + xlab("") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank())

p_markers_mean
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Distance bin immune composition (stacked + facet)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Find distance column name
grep("dist|Dist|um|mic|Distance", names(roi_summary), value = TRUE)

dist_col <- "Distance_nerve_um"

roi_binned <- roi_summary %>%
  mutate(
    distance_um = as.numeric(.data[[dist_col]]),
    distance_bin = case_when(
      distance_um <= 200 ~ "≤200 µm",
      distance_um > 200 & distance_um <= 600 ~ "200–600 µm",
      distance_um >= 700 ~ "≥700 µm",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    distance_bin = factor(distance_bin, levels = c("≤200 µm", "200–600 µm", "≥700 µm"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(distance_bin))

roi_binned %>% dplyr::count(distance_bin)

immune_long_bin <- roi_binned %>%
  dplyr::select(ROI_ID, distance_bin, all_of(immune_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(immune_cols), names_to = "RB_Immune", values_to = "percent") %>%
  mutate(
    RB_Immune = str_remove(RB_Immune, "^immune_"),
    RB_Immune = factor(RB_Immune, levels = immune_levels)
  )

immune_bin_mean <- immune_long_bin %>%
  dplyr::group_by(distance_bin, RB_Immune) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_percent = mean(percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_percent   = sd(percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_roi        = n_distinct(ROI_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_bin_stacked <- ggplot(
  immune_bin_mean,
  aes(x = distance_bin, y = mean_percent, fill = RB_Immune)
) +

  geom_col() +

  scale_fill_manual(values = immune_palette, drop = FALSE) +

  ylab("Mean % across ROIs") +
  xlab("Distance bin") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +

  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

p_bin_stacked

p_bin_facet <- ggplot(immune_bin_mean, aes(x = distance_bin, y = mean_percent)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_percent - sd_percent, ymax = mean_percent + sd_percent), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~RB_Immune, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  ylab("Mean % across ROIs (±SD)") + xlab("Distance bin") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_bin_facet

ggsave("immune_mean_by_distancebin_stacked.pdf", p_bin_stacked, width = 7, height = 4)
ggsave("immune_mean_by_distancebin_facet.pdf",   p_bin_facet,   width = 12, height = 8)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Correlation analysis (Spearman)
# ----------------------------------------------------------
markers <- c("IFNG_percent", "CXCL9_percent", "IL1B_percent", "PDL1_CD45+PDL1+")
markers <- markers[markers %in% names(roi_summary)]

cor_results <- lapply(markers, function(m) {

  df <- roi_summary %>%
    dplyr::select(distance = all_of(dist_col), value = all_of(m)) %>%
    mutate(distance = as.numeric(distance)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(distance), !is.na(value))

  test <- cor.test(df$distance, df$value, method = "spearman")

  data.frame(
    marker = m,
    rho = unname(test$estimate),
    p_value = test$p.value,
    n = nrow(df)
  )
})

cor_results <- bind_rows(cor_results)
cor_results

# Scatter + stat_cor
marker_long_corr <- roi_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(ROI_ID, distance = all_of(dist_col), all_of(markers)) %>%
  mutate(distance = as.numeric(distance)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(markers), names_to = "marker", values_to = "percent") %>%
  filter(!is.na(percent), !is.na(distance))

p_corr <- ggplot(marker_long_corr, aes(x = distance, y = percent)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black") +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman",
           label.x.npc = "left",
           label.y.npc = "top",
           size = 4) +
  facet_wrap(~marker, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(x = "Distance to nerve (µm)",
       y = "% positive cells per ROI") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black"))

p_corr
```


```{r}
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Cytokine / checkpoint markers across distance bins
# ----------------------------------------------------------

markers <- c(
  "IFNG_percent",
  "CXCL9_percent",
  "IL1B_percent",
  "PDL1_CD45+PDL1+"
)

markers <- markers[markers %in% names(roi_summary)]

marker_bin_long <- roi_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(ROI_ID, distance_bin, all_of(markers)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(markers),
    names_to = "marker",
    values_to = "percent"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(distance_bin), !is.na(percent))

# ------------------------------------------
# Mean + SD per bin
# ------------------------------------------

marker_bin_summary <- marker_bin_long %>%
  group_by(marker, distance_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_percent = mean(percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_percent = sd(percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_roi = n_distinct(ROI_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ------------------------------------------
# Plot mean ± SD
# ------------------------------------------

p_marker_bins <- ggplot(
  marker_bin_summary,
  aes(x = distance_bin, y = mean_percent)
) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_percent - sd_percent,
      ymax = mean_percent + sd_percent
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~marker, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  xlab("Distance to nerve") +
  ylab("Mean % positive cells per ROI (± SD)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black")
  )

p_marker_bins

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Cytokine / checkpoint markers across distance bins
# (boxplot + ROI points)
# ----------------------------------------------------------

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# Cytokine / checkpoint markers across distance bins
# (boxplot + ROI points)
# ----------------------------------------------------------

markers <- c(
  "IFNG_percent",
  "CXCL9_percent",
  "IL1B_percent",
  "PDL1_CD45+PDL1+"
)

markers <- markers[markers %in% names(roi_summary)]

marker_bin_long <- roi_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(ROI_ID, distance_bin, all_of(markers)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(markers),
    names_to = "marker",
    values_to = "percent"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(distance_bin), !is.na(percent))

p_marker_bins2 <- ggplot(
  marker_bin_long,
  aes(x = distance_bin, y = percent)
) +

  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.55,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = "grey85",
    color = "black"
  ) +

  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    size = 2.6,
    alpha = 0.85
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~marker, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +

  labs(
    x = "Distance to nerve",
    y = "% positive cells per ROI"
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black")
  )

p_marker_bins2
ggsave("inflammatory_millieu_bins.pdf",   p_marker_bins2,   width = 12, height = 8)
```


```{r}
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 5) Kruskal tests by distance bin + Dunn posthoc
# ----------------------------------------------------------
roi_summary <- roi_summary %>%
  mutate(
    distance_um = as.numeric(.data[[dist_col]]),
    distance_bin = case_when(
      distance_um <= 200 ~ "≤200 µm",
      distance_um > 200 & distance_um <= 600 ~ "200–600 µm",
      distance_um >= 700 ~ "≥700 µm",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    distance_bin = factor(distance_bin, levels = c("≤200 µm", "200–600 µm", "≥700 µm"))
  )

kw_results <- lapply(markers, function(m) {

  df <- roi_summary %>%
    dplyr::select(distance_bin, value = all_of(m)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(distance_bin), !is.na(value))

  test <- kruskal.test(value ~ distance_bin, data = df)

  data.frame(
    marker = m,
    statistic = unname(test$statistic),
    p_value = test$p.value,
    n = nrow(df)
  )
})

kw_results <- bind_rows(kw_results)
kw_results

# Save Kruskal-Wallis results
readr::write_csv(
  kw_results,
  "kruskal_distance_bin_results.csv"
)

# Dunn tests (BH correction) for each marker
dunn_results <- lapply(markers, function(m) {
  df <- roi_summary %>%
    dplyr::select(distance_bin, value = all_of(m)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(distance_bin), !is.na(value))

  out <- FSA::dunnTest(value ~ distance_bin, data = df, method = "bh")$res
  out$marker <- m
  out
})

dunn_results <- bind_rows(dunn_results)
dunn_results

# Save Dunn posthoc results
readr::write_csv(
  dunn_results,
  "dunn_distance_bin_posthoc_results.csv"
)

```

```{r}

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 6) Save main plots
# ----------------------------------------------------------
ggsave("immune_composition_per_ROI.pdf", p_immune_per_roi, width = 12, height = 6)
ggsave("immune_composition_mean_across_ROIs.pdf", p_immune_mean, width = 6, height = 4)

ggsave("per_ROI_marker_percentages.pdf", p_markers_per_roi, width = 12, height = 6)
ggsave("mean_marker_percentages_across_ROIs.pdf", p_markers_mean, width = 7, height = 4)

ggsave("marker_distance_correlations.pdf", p_corr, width = 10, height = 6)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 7) Report which immune labels used fallback colors
# ----------------------------------------------------------
fallback_used <- setdiff(levels(immune_long$RB_Immune), names(color_maping))
if (length(fallback_used) > 0) {
  message("No color in color_maping for: ", paste(fallback_used, collapse = ", "))
  message("Assigned fallback colors automatically (hcl.colors Dark 3).")
} else {
  message("All immune categories have a defined color in color_maping.")
}
```
